steps.name: workflow-schema-and-engine
steps.summary: 11_itsm_workflow.sql(ticket 확장 컬럼 + ticket_request_type/workflow_definition/instance/instance_step) + TicketRequestType·WorkflowDefinition·WorkflowInstance·WorkflowInstanceStep 엔티티(전이 매트릭스는 advance/reject/complete/reopen 도메인 메서드) + WorkflowEngineService(start/executeAction/findOverdue, INVALID_WORKFLOW_ACTION 가드) + 워크플로우 단위테스트 18건, 전체 232+ 테스트·build·local validate 기동 통과
